title: Create: More Cakes
description: Adds Plain & Chocolate cakes with different toppings using Create style recipes.
body:
### Adds new cakes with 5 different topings and empty cakes, all with a chocolate icing alternative and also adds a Marzipan cake, using recipes that fit with Create.

## List of toppings

- Nothing
- Sweet berries (basically a vanilla cake)
- Glow berries
- Strawberries
- Blueberries
- Raspberries

Making cakes with non vanilla toppings require a seperate mod to add the item

## Features & Crafting

- Candles can remain on cakes with up to 2 eaten slices.
- The mod will work without Create but you wont be able to craft any cakes.
- A partially eaten cake can be picked up.
- A Cake Base is crafted using dough, milk & sugar in a crafting table or mixer and is then cooked in a Furnace, Smoker or by Smoking to make a Baked Cake Base.
- Use a Spout with Milk or Chocolate to make a Plain or Chocolate cake.
- Interact with a Cake while holding a topping or use a Deployer to put toppings on Cakes.
- Craft Marzipan with Almonds, Sugar, Lime dye and a tiny bit of Water and place it on a Plain Cake to make a Marzipan Cake. Almonds need to be added by a different mod.

If you want Chocolate Base variants of the cakes you can install [Create: Chocolate Cakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-chocolate-cakes) :)
